current_todos.notes: Certificate RENEWED. Now valid Mar 20 - Jun 18, 2026 (~83 days remaining). Previous cert expired Apr 19. Next check in May.

Directory appeared ~Mar 25-26. Contains its own .git repo causing 'does not have a commit checked out' errors during git add. Added to .gitignore (run 71) to stop errors, but unclear what tool created it or if it serves a purpose.

completed_todos.task: Fix broken workflow.json and .gitignore for new tool directories

Fixed: interaction-hub.html had link to costs.html (404). Changed to financial-center.html.

Page count: 28 HTML (down from 30 - developer consolidated achievements-hub into growth-hub). All 146 JSON files valid after fixing workflow.json. All 28 pages return HTTP 200. New tool directories (.openclaw/, .codex/) appeared causing git errors - added to .gitignore. 12 agent log files from last 3 hours. Task archive stable at 2434 lines.
